source: synthetic — Phase 6 of the Skill CC-convergence refactor
scenario: User asks for an end-to-end scRNA pipeline starting from a GEO accession, including cell-type annotation. The orchestrator recipe scrna-geo-pipeline should be chosen, and the agent should chain three Skill(...) calls (fetch-geo-processed-matrices → scrna-qc-clustering-v2 → annotate-celltype-scrna) rather than inlining the whole pipeline in run_python.
intent: do a full scRNA-seq pipeline on GSE192391 — fetch the data, QC and cluster one sample, then annotate the clusters with cell types

content.text: do a full scRNA-seq pipeline on GSE192391 — fetch the data, QC and cluster one sample, then annotate the clusters with cell types
